summary: Re-verified Rajkumari Luxury Spices MVP after iteration_1 sign-off. Backend pytest still passes 18/18 (root, products, auth register/login/me, admin RBAC, Stripe checkout session+status, orders/mine, validations). Frontend Playwright smoke verified: hero-section + hero-3d-packet visible with correct headline, 3 home product cards, 4 shop cards, story/why/about/showcase sections render, admin route gated (unauth → /login), admin login (admin@rajkumari.in / Royal@2026) succeeds and lands on /admin with orders/users/products tabs, register page renders, logo loads (naturalWidth 4167). Checkout flow: POST /api/checkout/session returns 200 with valid stripe checkout.stripe.com URL + session_id + order_id (validated via curl with real product id).
critical_code_review_comments: Footer.jsx does not embed an explicit 'Made with Emergent' badge inside the <footer> element; the badge visible bottom-right on every page is the platform-injected global Emergent badge. Functionally acceptable (requirement is satisfied at page level), but if PM wants it inside the footer column itself, add a small badge text.
server.py @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') uses deprecated FastAPI event handlers — migrate to lifespan context manager for FastAPI 0.110+ best practice (non-blocking).
server.py stripe_webhook silently returns {ok:false} on exception — add structured error logging/metric for production observability (carried over from iteration_1).
JWT_SECRET has hardcoded fallback in code; .env supplies it, but consider failing fast in production if env var missing.
create_checkout: order.status field stores the raw Stripe status ('open','expired') when not paid; consider normalising to internal lifecycle states.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@rajkumari.in / Royal@2026 (auto-seeded). Customer users created dynamically via /api/auth/register.
seed_data_creation: One extra TEST_ Stripe checkout session + order (payment_status: pending) created via curl probe. Does not affect production data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all required flows. data-testid selectors confirmed working: hero-section, hero-3d-packet, product-card-<slug>, add-to-cart-<slug>, cart-drawer, cart-subtotal, cart-checkout-btn, login-page, login-email, login-password, login-submit, register-page, admin-page, admin-tab-{orders,users,products}, shop-page. When asserting checkout in Playwright, capture the POST /api/checkout/session response BEFORE the page redirects to Stripe (e.g., page.expect_response prior to clicking checkout). Note: domcontentloaded is preferable to networkidle because SpiceParticles canvas keeps the network/animation loop busy.
